title: polygala vulgaris proles lensaei
intro: Polygala vulgaris proles lensaei, also known as the Small Spurge or Polygala, is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat respiratory and cardiovascular issues. The health benefits of Polygala vulgaris proles lensaei include its ability to calm the nervous system, alleviate anxiety, and reduce inflammation. Traditional herbal preparations include dried roots and leaves being made into teas, infusions, or capsules, which are often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
